title: DCAT-AP+ to NFDICore Mapping via SHACL Bridges

context.problem: DCAT-AP+ uses flat PROV-O patterns (Activity-Entity-Agent linked directly), while NFDICore uses BFO patterns with mediated relationships through roles, processes, and participation axioms. A simple 1:1 class crosswalk cannot capture these structural differences.
context.goal: Create declarative bridge.yaml files that transform DCAT-AP+ RDF instance data into NFDICore-conformant RDF, handling n-to-m structural transformations.
context.approach: Decompose into multiple bridges organized by subgraph pattern, iterate with human-in-the-loop review, compose incrementally.

shared_class_uri_strategy.rationale: Design source_pattern triples with enough structural context to uniquely identify each subgraph shape. No pre-processing needed. Relies on the tool's nested sh:property constraints.
shared_class_uri_strategy.fallback: If a specific bridge proves ambiguous in testing, add targeted pre-processing for that case.

starting_phase.rationale: Dataset + DataGeneratingActivity + EvaluatedEntity + Agent splitting covers the heart of the DCAT-AP+/PROV-O pattern and demonstrates all key bridge patterns.

open_questions: Can we define an 'evaluand role' for processes in BFO? BFO restricts roles to independent continuants.
Should EvaluatedActivity be mapped as a simple BFO:process with a causal relation?
Should the relationship be modeled through an information content entity?
Does NFDICore need extension to accommodate this pattern?

source_schema.name: DCAT-AP+

QuantitativeAttribute.description: Numeric property with value, unit, quantity kind

source_schema.critical_note: Multiple LinkML classes share the same class_uri (e.g., Entity, EvaluatedEntity, AnalysisSourceData all use prov:Entity). Discrimination must happen through graph topology.

csv_mapping.usage: Lookup table for class correspondences. NOT authoritative for structural mappings.

prov_bfo_paper.usage: Reference for predicate mappings and formal justification for class alignments

key_mappings_from_paper.prov:Entity: subClassOf BFO:continuant (independent OR GDC OR SDC, NOT spatial_region)
key_mappings_from_paper.prov:Agent: subClassOf BFO:material_entity AND (participates_in SOME Activity) AND (bearer_of SOME (role AND has_realization SOME Activity))

phases.title: Prepare Representative Test Data
phases.description: Generate Turtle from DCAT-AP+ LinkML test YAML using linkml-convert

bridges.title: Core Data Generation Pattern

class_map.comment: EvaluatedEntity — keep IRI, further typed later

human_review_needed: Confirm NFDI_0010029 vs NFDI_0010031 for DataGeneratingActivity
Confirm BFO relation: BFO:0000056 (participates_in) vs RO:0002234 (has_output)
Decide whether EvaluatedEntity should get a target type at this stage

bridges.title: Agent Splitting
human_review_needed: Which specific role subclass? Generic NFDI_0000229 or more specific?
Should Device vs Software get different roles?

bridges.title: Plan Mapping
bridges.target_pattern: TBD — prov:Plan to IAO:0000030 or subclass

phases.title: Attributes Pattern

bridges.title: Quantitative Attributes on Entities
bridges.result: 2 qudt:Quantity blank nodes (molar mass) enriched with IAO data item type

bridges.title: Quantitative Attributes on Activities
bridges.result: 4 qudt:Quantity blank nodes (temperature, scans) enriched with IAO data item type

bridges.title: Quantitative Attributes on Agents
bridges.result: 2 qudt:Quantity blank nodes (chemical shift) enriched with IAO data item type

bridges.title: Qualitative Attributes on Activities
bridges.result: 2 prov:Entity blank nodes (pulse programme) enriched with IAO data item type

bridges.title: Qualitative Attributes on Entities
bridges.description: prov:Entity --dcterms:relation--> prov:Entity: same class_uri on both ends
bridges.blocking_issue: ISSUE-T4: _generate_variable_names() maps each CURIE to one variable, creating self-referential ?this dcterms:relation ?this

human_review_needed: Confirm IAO:0000027 (data item) is the right target for both quant and qual attributes
Should dcterms:relation be mapped to an IAO/BFO predicate (e.g., IAO:0000136 'is about' inverse)?
3 near-identical bridges for 2a — acceptable or should we fix ISSUE-T3?

phases.title: Evaluated Activity (DEFERRED)
phases.reason: Needs dedicated semantic discussion about roles on processes in BFO

composition.description: Run all bridges sequentially on the same data, verify no conflicts

per_bridge: shacl-bridges run <bridge>.yaml data.ttl — run against test data
Inspect diff.ttl — verify only expected triples added
end_to_end: Load complete expanded graph in rdflib
Competency query: every dcat:Dataset also has type nfdi:dataset
Competency query: every agent has a minted role instance
Check for contradictions (e.g., both BFO:continuant and BFO:occurrent)
